base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of map_popups — a ui (dialog) from 1988 super mario bros 3. World-map popup dialogs — 'I won!', stage-name banner, King-transformed animal prompts. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: World-map popup dialogs — 'I won!', stage-name banner, King-transformed animal prompts
